name: Merchants Bancorp
summary: Merchants Bancorp is a diversified bank holding company headquartered in Carmel, Indiana, operating through three segments: Multi-family Mortgage Banking (originating and servicing affordable multi-family housing and healthcare facility loans, syndicating LIHTC and debt funds); Mortgage Warehousing (warehouse financing for mortgage bankers); and Banking (portfolio lending, retail mortgage banking, SBA lending, agricultural lending, and community banking). As of December 31, 2025, the company had $19.4 billion in assets, $13.0 billion in deposits, and $2.3 billion in shareholders equity.

products.name: Multi-family Mortgage Banking
products.description: Origination and servicing of affordable multi-family housing and healthcare facility loans via FHA, Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and USDA programs.

products.name: LIHTC Tax Credit Syndication
products.description: Fully integrated tax credit equity syndication for Section 42 LIHTC, Historic Rehabilitation Tax Credits, and State tax credits.

products.name: Mortgage Warehouse Lending
products.description: Warehouse repurchase agreements, loan participations, and operating lines of credit for independent mortgage bankers.

products.name: SBA Lending
products.description: Small Business Administration loan origination offered through the Banking segment.

products.name: Agricultural Lending
products.description: Agricultural loans offered through the Banking segment.

products.name: Retail and Correspondent Residential Mortgage Banking
products.description: Retail and correspondent residential mortgage banking services offered through the Banking segment.

products.name: MIP Debt Investment Vehicles
products.description: Registered investment advisor deploying third-party institutional capital into high-quality assets originated by MCC, including securitizations and credit risk transfer vehicles.

partnerships.description: Approved seller/servicer; originates and sells affordable multi-family loans as mortgage-backed securities.
Approved seller/servicer; originates and sells affordable multi-family loans as mortgage-backed securities.
Approved issuer/servicer for government-backed mortgage securities.
Approved lender for multi-family and healthcare facility financing under FHA programs.
Approved USDA Rural Housing 538 lender for affordable housing in rural markets.
Referenced as a defined term in the company's glossary; specific relationship details not elaborated.
